_comment_naming: Folder name = persona slot (NOT a channel name). See pencils/README.md.
_comment_ports: Each pencil reserves Gateway port (18080+) and channel port (18090+). Bump for each new slot.
_comment_storage: Step A (doc 16): dataDir defaults to ~/.pencils/gateway/, agentDir to ~/.pencils/agents/<id>/. Override via PENCILS_HOME / PENCILS_AGENTS_DIR / PENCILS_GATEWAY_DIR env, or per-agent agentDir below. Pre-Step-A users with data at ~/.pencils/<id>/ are auto-detected and the legacy path is reused with a warning until `pencils migrate` is run.

agents.name: Pencil 01 (rename me)
agents._comment_agentDir: Optional override; defaults to ~/.pencils/agents/<id>/ (Step A). Use ~/ prefix or absolute path. Aligned with `nanopencil` CLI's home directory so /login + /model writes go to the same place the Gateway reads.

soul.systemPrompt: 你是这只 pencil 的灵魂。请在此写下你的人格、风格、偏好、禁忌。

channels._comment_enabled: Flip to true after filling accounts.dingtalk.default.webhookSecret and adding a route.

default._comment_env_refs: Soft refs `${VAR:-}` keep Gateway boot working when the env var is unset (channel auto-disables); switch to hard `${VAR}` if you want startup to fail loudly when secrets are missing.
